error_signature: input value not updating in sub-workflow
title: Input value not updating in sub-workflow execution
symptom: The input value 'richting' remains 'stadteinwärts' in the sub-workflow execution, even when changed in the main workflow.
not_this_if: The issue does not occur when recreating the workflows from scratch
root_cause: The issue arises when the workflow retains stale input values due to internal caching or state management issues in n8n. This can happen if the workflow is copied or modified without fully refreshing the input parameters.
fix_steps: Re-create the workflows from scratch, node by node
Only copy/paste the node parameters if necessary
agent_instruction: Re-create the workflows from scratch to resolve the input value issue.
